title: ORBT Error Artifact
description: Strict schema for ORBT telemetry error artifacts. Emitted by the Auditor for every FAIL or A_MASTER classification. Captures operational context for centralized error tracking.

process_id.description: Process identifier from WORK_PACKET. Format: PRC-<SYSTEM>-<EPOCH>.

orbt_mode.description: ORBT execution mode at time of failure.

altitude_level.description: CTB altitude level where failure occurred (e.g., 5000, 10000, 20000, 30000, 40000, 60000).

error_code.description: Machine-readable error code (e.g., FAIL_EXECUTION, FAIL_SCOPE, MOUNT_INTEGRITY_FAIL).

severity.description: Severity level. A_MASTER triggers automatic certification abort.

failure_surface.description: The surface where failure was detected (e.g., auditor_phase_1, mount_integrity, sanitation_san003).
